name: E2E reusable login command bar event
description: The reusable test user signs in, creates an event using the AI Command Bar, verifies it, and deletes it for test isolation

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard and weekly calendar to load
Press Control+K or Meta+K to open the Command Bar
Type Jadwalkan TestSprite Reusable Event besok jam 4:30 sore selama 45 menit into the Command Bar input
Wait for the AI to parse the request and the Event Dialog to appear
Click the 'Simpan Event' button in the event dialog
Navigate the weekly calendar to the week containing tomorrow if needed
Verify the weekly calendar shows an event block containing TestSprite Reusable Event
Click the TestSprite Reusable Event block to open its event dialog
Click the Hapus button and confirm the browser deletion prompt
Verify the deleted-event undo banner appears, confirming the reusable test event was cleaned up
